title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an AI feature by Anthropic that generates website prototypes, landing pages, and presentations from text prompts. The tutorial demonstrates its ability to convert design specifications into functional HTML/CSS code and UI components with minimal user input.
